features.name: T-Strings (PEP 750)
features.description: New t-string literal (t'prefix') which returns a Template object. Allows for safe SQL/HTML interpolation and custom tag functions.

features.name: Subinterpreters (PEP 734)
features.description: True multi-core parallelism via concurrent.interpreters. Allows running multiple isolated Python environments within a single process without the GIL.

features.name: Deferred Annotations (PEP 649/749)
features.description: Annotations are evaluated lazily via annotationlib. Improves startup time and handles forward references gracefully.

features.name: JIT Compiler
features.description: Experimental Just-In-Time compiler enabled by default in Windows/macOS binaries. Improves performance for hot code paths.

features.name: Tail Call Optimization
features.description: New interpreter loop (Clang 19+) uses tail calls for 3-5% speedup on supported platforms.

features.name: Zstandard (PEP 784)
features.description: Native support for Zstandard compression via compression.zstd and tarfile/zipfile integration.
